nameMeanings.name: Hervey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Harvey  .

variants.name: Harvey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French and Middle English personal name Hervei, also found as Herveu, Hervé, and Hervi. The name Herveu or Herv(e)i was borne by a number of Bretons at the Norman Conquest and, as such, represents a French form of the Old Breton name Hoiearnviu or Hærviu (see Herve ). Among Normans Herve(i) or Herv(e)i was also a French form of ancient Germanic Hariwic, Herewic (from hari ‘army’ + wīg ‘war’), with intervocalic /w/ becoming /v/ in Old French. The Breton and ancient Germanic names were commonly Latinized as Herve(i)us and Hervic(i)us respectively but, since their most common vernacular forms in Old French were indistinguishable, the Latin forms were also sometimes interchangeable, especially Herveus.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAirmheadhaigh ‘descendant of Airmheadhach’, a personal name probably meaning ‘esteemed’. It seems to be a derivative of Airmheadh, the name borne by a mythological physician.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchaidh ‘descendant of Earchadh’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: John

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hervey was born in 1420, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Hervey Sr, was 12 and his mother, Jane de Paston, was 33. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Christian Chichley. He died in 1480, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hervey est né en 1420, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Hervey Sr, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Jane de Paston, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Christian Chichley. Il est décédé en 1480, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hervey 1420 in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Hervey Sr 12 und seine Mutter Jane de Paston 33. Er hatte mit Christian Chichley mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1480 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hervey è nato il nel 1420 nel Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Hervey Sr, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Jane de Paston, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Christian Chichley. Morì nel 1480, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Hervey(이)가 1420년 영국 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hervey Sr(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane de Paston(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Christian Chichley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hervey nasceu em 1420, em Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Hervey Sr, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Paston, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Christian Chichley. Ele faleceu em 1480, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hervey родился в 1420 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Hervey Sr было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane de Paston, 33. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Christian Chichley. Он умер в 1480 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.
